metadata.ogDescription: Transform trends and ideas into structured visual content. Inspiration cards, AI infographics, video translation, and localization tools — all in one platform.

hero.title: Discover Ideas | Express Visually | Create Content

From inspiration cards and AI infographics to subtitles, translation, and lip-sync dubbing — we bridge inspiration and production, helping creators publish faster.

multimodal.title: Multi-modal Recognition
multimodal.desc: We combine speech and subtitle signals to achieve more accurate and robust transcription. This dual-channel recognition reduces errors and ensures better alignment with the original content, especially in noisy or complex audio scenes.

emotional.title: Emotional Speech
emotional.desc: Our voice synthesis models generate expressive, emotionally rich speech that enhances storytelling and viewer engagement. By capturing tone, rhythm, and nuance, we make AI voices feel more human and relatable.

lengthaware.title: Length-aware Translation and Customization
lengthaware.desc: We optimize translations not just for accuracy, but also for timing and pacing—crucial for video and voice alignment. Users can further customize tone, length, and phrasing to suit different content needs or audience preferences.

controlled.title: Controlled Video Generation
controlled.desc: We enable structured, template-driven video generation with controllable visual elements and transitions. This gives creators both creative freedom and production consistency, reducing manual effort while ensuring high-quality output.

metadata.title: Free Bilingual Subtitles Generator | Curify AI
metadata.description: Create bilingual subtitles for your videos with Curify’s free AI-powered tool. Perfect for YouTube, TikTok, education, and global creators.

bilingual.title: Bilingual Subtitles Made Easy
bilingual.description: Automatically generate subtitles in two languages using Curify’s AI subtitle engine. Ideal for creators, educators, and global businesses.
bilingual.example: Example: Jensen Huang explaining AI strategy — English + Chinese subtitles auto-generated.

why.title: Why Choose Curify for Bilingual Subtitles?
why.point1: Supports over 170 languages with accurate translation.
why.point3: Perfect for YouTube, TikTok, and educational videos.
why.point4: Export ready-to-publish subtitle files or embedded videos.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Yes, Curify offers a free plan with limited subtitle minutes per month.
faq.q2: Can I edit subtitles after generation?
faq.a2: Absolutely. You can adjust timing, translation, and style before exporting.

what.title: What Are Bilingual Subtitles?
what.p1: Bilingual subtitles display two languages simultaneously on screen — typically the original spoken language and a translated version directly below it. Instead of replacing the original captions, bilingual subtitles preserve the source language while adding a synchronized translation.
what.p2: This format is widely used in language learning videos, international YouTube channels, online courses, conference recordings, and global marketing. It helps viewers compare meaning in real time, improves comprehension, and expands accessibility without re-recording your video.
what.p3: For example, a tech keynote delivered in English can show English on the first line and Chinese, Spanish, or Japanese on the second line — turning one video into a global asset.

how.title: How Curify Generates High-Quality Bilingual Subtitles
how.p1: Curify is not a simple caption generator. Our bilingual subtitle engine is built on a multi-stage AI translation pipeline designed for accuracy, timing precision, and contextual understanding.
how.p2: First, we transcribe your video using high-accuracy speech recognition that handles natural speech, technical vocabulary, and multi-speaker dialogue. Then we translate with context-aware models that preserve intent and domain meaning — not just literal words.
how.p3: Next, Curify aligns translated subtitles to the original speech segments, optimizing timing and readability. We keep line length balanced, choose clean sentence breaks, and maintain a natural reading speed for stacked dual-language subtitles.
how.p4: Finally, Curify refines translations to better preserve tone — persuasive, educational, humorous, or dramatic — and ensures punctuation and rhythm feel natural in the target language.
how.p5: You can export subtitle files (e.g., SRT), download bilingual subtitle tracks, or embed bilingual subtitles directly into your video — and edit timing, translation, and styling before publishing.

usecases.title: Who Uses Bilingual Subtitles?
usecases.creatorsBody: Creators use bilingual subtitles to reach international audiences without managing separate channels. Bilingual subtitles can increase watch time, improve engagement from multilingual viewers, and help content rank in international search. On short-form platforms where videos autoplay without sound, bilingual subtitles also boost retention and accessibility.
usecases.educationBody: Educational content benefits significantly from bilingual subtitles. Students can compare terminology across languages, retain vocabulary more easily, and follow complex explanations with less friction. This is especially useful for STEM lectures, certification courses, and language learning materials where accuracy and consistency matter.
usecases.businessBody: Businesses use bilingual subtitles for product demos, investor presentations, training videos, and marketing campaigns. Instead of producing separate localized videos, you can ship a single multilingual asset — reducing production cost while expanding global reach.

videoDubbing.title: AI Video Dubbing with Natural Voice
videoDubbing.description: Translate and dub your video content into over 170 languages with realistic AI voice and lip sync. Perfect for international creators and brands.
videoDubbing.example: Example: AI-dubbed video with emotion preservation and lip sync across languages.

demo.caption: Example: AI-dubbed video with emotion preservation and lip sync across languages
demo.aria: AI video dubbing demo across multiple languages

why.title: Why Choose Curify AI Video Dubbing?
why.point1: Natural AI voice cloning that preserves speaker emotion and tone
why.point2: Automatic lip sync for a seamless viewing experience
why.point5: Ideal for YouTube, TikTok, corporate training, and e-learning

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How accurate is the AI dubbing?
faq.a1: Curify uses advanced voice cloning and translation models designed to preserve the original speaker’s tone, intent, and pacing. Lip sync further improves perceived realism by matching speech timing to the speaker’s mouth movement.
faq.a2: Curify supports 170+ languages, including English, Spanish, Chinese, French, German, Japanese, Korean, Arabic, and many more.
faq.a3: Processing time depends on video length and complexity, but most videos are ready within minutes. You’ll see progress updates and get notified when the dubbed video is complete.

what.title: What Is AI Video Dubbing?
what.p1: AI video dubbing is the process of translating spoken dialogue into another language and generating a natural-sounding voice track that matches the original delivery. Unlike subtitles, dubbing replaces the audio — making your content feel native to viewers in each target language.
what.p2: High-quality dubbing requires more than translation. It must preserve meaning, tone, pacing, and emotion, while staying aligned with the speaker’s timing. For training content, product demos, and creator videos, this alignment is what separates “robotic” dubbing from professional localization.
what.p3: Curify is built for modern global content: one upload, multilingual output — optimized for creators, educators, and businesses that need speed and quality at scale.

how.title: How Curify Produces Natural Dubbing (Voice, Timing, and Lip Sync)
how.p1: Curify’s dubbing quality comes from a multi-stage pipeline designed for faithful meaning, natural prosody, and tight alignment to the original video.
how.p2: Step 1: High-accuracy transcription captures the original speech structure, including pauses, emphasis, and speaker turns. This becomes the timing backbone for the dubbing track.
how.p3: Step 2: Context-aware translation preserves intent and domain meaning — especially for technical terms, brand language, and instructional content. We avoid literal phrasing when it sounds unnatural in the target language.
how.p4: Step 3: Voice synthesis generates a natural voice track with controlled pacing. We optimize segment length and reading speed so the translated speech fits the original timing without sounding rushed or overly slow.
how.p5: Step 4: Optional lip sync aligns speech timing to mouth motion for a more immersive viewing experience — particularly important for face-to-camera videos, interviews, and training sessions.

usecases.title: Who Uses AI Dubbing?
usecases.creatorsTitle: For YouTube, TikTok, and Global Creators
usecases.creatorsBody: Creators use dubbing to reach new audiences without running separate productions. Dubbing makes content easier to consume than subtitles in many contexts, especially for entertainment, tutorials, and fast-paced short-form videos.
usecases.educationBody: Training teams and course creators use dubbing to localize onboarding, compliance, and product education. A natural voice track reduces cognitive load compared to reading subtitles — improving completion rates and learner retention.
usecases.businessTitle: For Product Marketing and Customer Education
usecases.businessBody: Global teams localize demos, explainers, webinars, and support videos with dubbing. Instead of recreating content per region, you can ship one video and deploy multiple language versions with consistent messaging.

compare.title: AI Dubbing vs Subtitles: Which Should You Use?
compare.p1: Subtitles are ideal when viewers are comfortable reading, when you want to preserve the original audio, or when you need the fastest publishing workflow. Dubbing is ideal when you want a native viewing experience, higher engagement, and less reliance on reading.
compare.p2: Many teams use both: subtitles for speed and accessibility, dubbing for top-performing content and key markets. Curify supports both workflows so you can choose the right format for each video.
